scripts.build: cd admin && rm -rf dist && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf public && mkdir -p public/portal && cp -r admin/dist/* public/portal/ && cp index.html public/ && cp prototype.html public/ && cp echelon-logo-v10.html public/ && cp admin/public/favicon.svg public/portal/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp racer-sportif-logo.png public/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp vechelon-halfchainring.svg public/ 2>/dev/null || true
